name: devshop
description: Project-agnostic Claude Code skills, shipped as plugins.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Autonomous GitHub-issue-driven dev workflow — plan, build, merge: /crew:pro is the attended planner that turns one rough instruction ticket into a granular board grouped under epics (gatherer → interpreter → planner; it interviews you, then auto-promotes the work tickets to agent-ready and closes the instruction ticket); /crew:run drives agent-ready issues through implementation, qa, review, mr-review, ui-review (a measured visual-fidelity gate for UI tickets — computed typography + font-load vs the design), and findings subagents to ready-for-review MRs; /crew:pulls is a fully-autonomous merge loop that runs alongside it, merging by default with a human comment as the only brake (pull-triage + merge-judge agents); /crew:adjust onboards a project and sets up the required GitHub App bot identity (crew-identity) — onboarding stops if the bot can't be minted.
